_description: EXAMPLE FILE - This shows the format for Control Tower promotion approvals. Copy relevant fields to approved-promotions.json to approve a specific packet for promotion.

approvals.approval_notes: Curator review complete. Clean-room wording audit passed. Legal domain confirmed. Source verified as Green tier. Low defamation risk.

approval_scope_options: single_publication - approve only this one case
batch_publication - approve multiple cases (requires explicit listing)
emergency_override - requires second Control Tower approver
blocked_conditions: Yellow or Red source tier (unless emergency_override with dual approval)
Existing public record with same incident_id
